title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: AI Master demonstrates building a complete event management system with role-based access control, permissions, and workflow automations using Softr's AI Co-Builder. The workflow emphasizes cost savings compared to manual AI prompt iterations for app development. The video covers database structure generation, automation features, and compares Softr to competitors like Lovable and Replit.
